title: rubus rivanus
intro: Rubus rivanus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Tibetan raspberry, is a type of plant in the rose family that grows in the mountainous regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus rivanus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, among others. Rubus rivanus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are available in some health food stores and online.
